title: Junior Python Developer → Team Lead (Spiders & QA)
description: Rentumo is a rental housing search engine where automated Python scrapers scan 6,459 housing websites and find 38,833+ new listings every day across 10+ countries. Role involves developing and maintaining Python spiders, debugging scraping problems, improving stability, collaborating with QA team on data quality, and monitoring scraping performance. Path to spider team lead over time.
match_reasons: Direct Playwright scraping experience in Job_dk project|GPMdb pipeline scraping 40,000+ samples at DTU HealthTech|Strong Python across thesis, research, and hobby projects
gaps: No commercial scraping at 7,000 spider scale|No Selenium experience|No formal CI/CD or QA process
